acceptance_targets: [ch18_craft_001_sanitization_tone_deflection] PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:305 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:356 contains at least 3 concrete fallout beats (body reaction, failed task, interrupted speech, or silence with physical cost) before any comic tertiary-character moment appears; FAIL if tonal relief arrives first.

[ch18_craft_002_timidity_emotion_backpedal] PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:421-434 includes one unqualified emotional action from Eli (not just narration about avoiding emotion) that produces an observable consequence in the next paragraph; FAIL if affect remains only described as restraint.

[ch18_prose_001_interiority_drought] PASS if the revised span snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:367-391 contains no run longer than 4 paragraphs without explicit Eli interiority; FAIL if any 10+ paragraph run remains interior-free.

[ch18_prose_002_repeating_list_formula] PASS if, across those three target spans, no more than one paragraph remains a pure serial list (3+ stacked items) and at least two sections convert data into scene-level action/reaction; FAIL if the repeated list template still dominates each block.

[FBK-02-005] PASS if revised lines at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6491 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6515 preserve all boundaries but include at least one abrupt tonal shift and one non-template interruption from June; FAIL if the exchange remains a clean rule recital.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:305 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:356 contains at least 3 concrete fallout beats (body reaction, failed task, interrupted speech, or silence with physical cost) before any comic tertiary-character moment appears; FAIL if tonal relief arrives first.
findings.evidence: After the core confession fallout, the scene pivots into tonal deflection beats: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:309, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:327, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:367, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:385.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter relieves pressure with whimsical side-character texture (frog-hat RA, playful campus banter, decorative street vignettes) before the confession's emotional damage is fully metabolized on-page, functioning as a safety valve rather than sustained consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the immediate aftermath anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:309 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:356 so Eli/June remain in active emotional consequence before comic or quirky external beats. Keep side-character detail only where it sharpens, not softens, the unresolved rupture.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:421-434 includes one unqualified emotional action from Eli (not just narration about avoiding emotion) that produces an observable consequence in the next paragraph; FAIL if affect remains only described as restraint.
findings.evidence: The prose repeatedly hedges away from full affect at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:421 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:433.
findings.problem: Timidity: Eli's emotional edge is immediately self-managed ("closest he could get to crying"; pruning lines for "apology theater"), which retreats from the raw emotional reality the chapter has earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:421 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:433 so at least one emotional beat is rendered directly (voice/body/action) without immediate meta-disclaimer language that frames feeling as something to avoid.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:367-391 contains no run longer than 4 paragraphs without explicit Eli interiority; FAIL if any 10+ paragraph run remains interior-free.
findings.evidence: A long external-only run occurs from the return sequence to apartment entry: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:367, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:369, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:385, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:391, before interior reset at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395.
findings.problem: The focalizer drops into camera-mode logistics for more than 10 consecutive paragraphs, which flattens close-third texture and reads screenplay-adjacent instead of interior fiction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject Eli's internal experience (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) into the travel-to-2B block anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:367 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:391, especially around transitions at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:385 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:389.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across those three target spans, no more than one paragraph remains a pure serial list (3+ stacked items) and at least two sections convert data into scene-level action/reaction; FAIL if the repeated list template still dominates each block.
findings.problem: A recurring serial-list sentence pattern appears more than twice and becomes a prose tic; procedural inventorying starts to sound auto-generated and reduces rhythmic variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the list-heavy blocks at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:283, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:397-401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:463-467 by converting at least two inventory dumps into enacted beats where one number triggers a felt reaction or practical dilemma.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:247-267 Eli mirrors June's wording no more than twice and adds character-specific language in at least 3 responses, and if in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:429-445 each of June/Nora/Theo has one line attributable without name tags; FAIL otherwise.
findings.evidence: Eli's mirrored responses and procedural echoing cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:247, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:251, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:259, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:267, with compressed compliance voice continuing in texts at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:431, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:437, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:441, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:445.
findings.problem: Dialogue pressure is partially lost to contract-recitation cadence: Eli's turn pattern over-mirrors June, and late-scene text replies compress into near-interchangeable compliance diction, weakening idiolect separation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework boundary-setting at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:247-267 and group-text aftermath at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:429-445 so each speaker retains distinct register under pressure (Eli's stress-logic then terseness, June's ironic-to-precise pivots, Theo's dry boundary enforcement, Nora's clinical brevity).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised end span shows Eli taking at least one specific action toward the $420 and encountering one explicit counterforce before the final paragraph; FAIL if the shortfall is still only text-message exposition plus anxious close.
findings.evidence: The added mortgage-cure obstacle is introduced and reiterated but not dramatized in action: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:415, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:465, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:489.
findings.problem: The chapter's closing stake (extra $420 by Friday) remains informational. Without an attempted move and resistance, the consequence functions as teaser instead of a causally active chapter turn.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:415 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:489, add one concrete attempt to source the extra $420 (shift ask, sale, advance request, expense cut) and one immediate obstacle or cost so the final line rests on enacted causality.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6491 and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6515 preserve all boundaries but include at least one abrupt tonal shift and one non-template interruption from June; FAIL if the exchange remains a clean rule recital.
findings.problem: Climactic father-daughter boundary scene is over-governed by checklist cadence, so June's voice repeatedly collapses into the same structured compliance register used elsewhere in the book.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep boundary clarity but loosen cadence at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6491, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6495, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6503, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6515 by adding tonal swings, partial sentences, and one emotionally messy interruption that still preserves terms.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
